summary: Iteration 37 - Full E2E testing of Ré'Actif Pro. All 8 requested features tested successfully: Account creation, logout, reconnection, dashboard navigation, D'CLIC PRO test, bob's passerelles (Concierge profile), D'CLIC import button, and backend API health.

issues: Console warning: Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent - accessibility improvement recommended

critical_code_review_comments: Auth flow (register/login/verify) working correctly with all data-testid attributes
D'CLIC PRO dark theme (#1e3a5f) correctly implemented with gradient buttons
Bob's passerelles correctly show Concierge-related jobs (Agent de propreté 92%, Agent de maintenance 78%)
No 'Consultant en évolution professionnelle' in bob's passerelles - bug fix verified
Dashboard navigation tabs all present: Accueil, Passeport, Coffre-fort, Observatoire, Explorateur, Évolution, Matching, Formations, Confidentialité
D'CLIC PRO import button visible on dashboard for authenticated users
seed_data_creation: Test users created during testing with TEST_ prefix pattern
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 8 requested features verified working. Key validations: 1) Account creation with CGU/Privacy checkboxes, 2) Logout redirects to landing, 3) Re-login works with same credentials, 4) All 9 dashboard tabs clickable, 5) D'CLIC PRO dark theme with 26 questions, 6) Bob's passerelles show Concierge-related jobs (NOT consultant), 7) D'CLIC import button visible on dashboard, 8) Backend APIs healthy.

1_account_creation.details: Register form with pseudo, password, confirm, CGU checkbox, Privacy checkbox. Redirects to /dashboard on success.

2_logout.details: Logout button in header redirects to landing page with 'Déconnexion réussie' toast.

3_reconnection.details: Login with same pseudo/password works, redirects to dashboard with 'Connexion réussie' toast.

4_dashboard_navigation.details: All 9 tabs present and clickable: Accueil, Passeport, Coffre-fort, Observatoire, Explorateur, Évolution, Matching, Formations, Confidentialité

5_dclic_pro_test.details: Dark theme (#1e3a5f = rgb(30,58,95)), birthdate step, education level selection, questionnaire with image choices, progress bar advancing.

6_bob_passerelles.details: Bob (Concierge) passerelles show: Agent de propreté (92%), Agent de maintenance (78%). NO 'Consultant en évolution professionnelle' - bug fix verified.

7_dclic_import_button.details: Button 'Boost mon profil avec D'CLIC PRO' visible on dashboard for authenticated users.

8_backend_api_health.details: GET /api/auth/verify, POST /api/auth/register, POST /api/auth/login all responding correctly.

jobs_found: Agent de propreté (bureaux / copropriétés / sites tertiaires) - 92% compatibilité
Agent de maintenance / petit entretien d'immeubles (multiservices) - 78% compatibilité
bob_passerelles_verification.bug_fix_status: VERIFIED - Passerelles now correctly prioritize CV title (Concierge) over transferable skills
